summary: Fixes minor parser, query, host-guard, UPC, LIKE escaping, and price-history index issues.
reason: Final review found latent edge cases around Latin-1 decoding, repeated query parameters, CSV-like UPC input, editions scoping, sub-dollar prices, LIKE filters, and retailer-filtered price history.
validated_outcome: go build ./..., go vet ./..., and go test ./... pass with GOCACHE=/tmp/blu-ray-pp-cli-gocache; UPC header/manual check returns only 012345678901 unresolved.
